items.title: S01E01 - Cha-Ka
items.summary: Will and Holly save a Pakuni ape-boy named Cha-Ka from Grumpy the Tyrannosaurus Rex.

infolabels.title: Cha-Ka
infolabels.plot: Will and Holly save a Pakuni ape-boy named Cha-Ka from Grumpy the Tyrannosaurus Rex.

infolabels.plot: While searching the Lost City, Will and Holly are captured by lizard-men which are known as Sleestak.

items.summary: The Marshalls attempt to escape the Land of the Lost by river and wind up trapped in a cave with a daffy Confederate miner.

items.title: S02E09 - A Nice Day
items.summary: A quiet day of fishing, trap building and cake making turns serious when Holly is pricked by a poisonous plant.

items.title: S02E11 - The Musician
items.summary: While searching the temple in the Lost City, Holly gets a ring stuck on her finger and Cha-Ka unwittingly awakens the Builder.

infolabels.plot: While searching the temple in the Lost City, Holly gets a ring stuck on her finger and Cha-Ka unwittingly awakens the Builder.

items.title: S02E12 - Split Personality
items.summary: Following an earthquake, a specter that resembles Holly materializes and pleads for help.

infolabels.title: Split Personality
infolabels.plot: Following an earthquake, a specter that resembles Holly materializes and pleads for help.

items.title: S02E13 - Blackout
items.summary: Enik seeks Rick's help when the Sleestak execute a nefarious plan to plunge the world into darkness and overpopulate it with their offspring.

infolabels.title: Blackout
infolabels.plot: Enik seeks Rick's help when the Sleestak execute a nefarious plan to plunge the world into darkness and overpopulate it with their offspring.

items.title: S03E01 - After-Shock
items.summary: Holly, Will, and Cha-Ka band together in the wake of devastating losses. Realizing that they now only have each other, the unlucky trio struggles to survive on their own until everybody's fortunes take a surprise turn for the better via a reunion with Uncle Jack!

infolabels.title: After-Shock
infolabels.plot: Holly, Will, and Cha-Ka band together in the wake of devastating losses. Realizing that they now only have each other, the unlucky trio struggles to survive on their own until everybody's fortunes take a surprise turn for the better via a reunion with Uncle Jack!

items.title: S03E02 - Survival Kit
items.summary: A deadly fever strikes Holly just as the Sleestaks make off with the family's medical supplies! Enik insists that the thievery is warranted, that tribute must be paid to Malak - a new, all-powerful god. Can Uncle Jack outsmart the Cro-Magnon con artist with some modern "magic" of his very own?

infolabels.title: Survival Kit
infolabels.plot: A deadly fever strikes Holly just as the Sleestaks make off with the family's medical supplies! Enik insists that the thievery is warranted, that tribute must be paid to Malak - a new, all-powerful god. Can Uncle Jack outsmart the Cro-Magnon con artist with some modern "magic" of his very own?

items.title: S03E03 - The Orb
items.summary: A mysterious pylon turns Will invisible! Perhaps this startling new power can enable him to free Enik - putting an end to the Sleestaks' foolish plan of unleashing the destructive powers of the orb and plunging the land forever into total darkness.

infolabels.title: The Orb
infolabels.plot: A mysterious pylon turns Will invisible! Perhaps this startling new power can enable him to free Enik - putting an end to the Sleestaks' foolish plan of unleashing the destructive powers of the orb and plunging the land forever into total darkness.

items.title: S03E04 - Repairman
items.summary: Someone has been tampering with the crystal matrix tables . . . Soon solar flares are raging out of control. As the world withers and dies under the intense heat, an unflappable British visitor arrives with curious knowledge about the troubled realm.

infolabels.title: Repairman
infolabels.plot: Someone has been tampering with the crystal matrix tables . . . Soon solar flares are raging out of control. As the world withers and dies under the intense heat, an unflappable British visitor arrives with curious knowledge about the troubled realm.

items.title: S03E05 - Medusa
items.summary: A runaway canoe sends Holly careening into the clutches of a mysterious young woman. "Meddy" implores the youngest Marshall to relax, to spend some time here in her garden admiring the remarkably lifelike statues . . . Will Holly realize her rescuer's true identity before it is too late?

infolabels.title: Medusa
infolabels.plot: A runaway canoe sends Holly careening into the clutches of a mysterious young woman. "Meddy" implores the youngest Marshall to relax, to spend some time here in her garden admiring the remarkably lifelike statues . . . Will Holly realize her rescuer's true identity before it is too late?

items.title: S03E06 - Cornered
items.summary: Stung by Torchy's poisonous tail, Will's fate hangs in the balance! Enik refuses to reveal the antidote unless the family rids the valley of the pesky fire-breathing dinosaur - forever. Soon Uncle Jack and Holly find themselves in a desperate race against time, one they all too easily can lose!

infolabels.title: Cornered
infolabels.plot: Stung by Torchy's poisonous tail, Will's fate hangs in the balance! Enik refuses to reveal the antidote unless the family rids the valley of the pesky fire-breathing dinosaur - forever. Soon Uncle Jack and Holly find themselves in a desperate race against time, one they all too easily can lose!

items.title: S03E07 - Flying Dutchman

infolabels.title: Flying Dutchman
infolabels.plot: A mysterious Captain tries to take Holly away on his flying ship.

items.title: S03E08 - Hot-Air Artist
items.summary: A hot air balloonist crashes on the Land of the Lost and promises to bring the Marshalls back to civilization... though he only intends to return with their uncivilized friend Cha-Ka.

infolabels.title: Hot-Air Artist
infolabels.plot: A hot air balloonist crashes on the Land of the Lost and promises to bring the Marshalls back to civilization... though he only intends to return with their uncivilized friend Cha-Ka.
